sections.paragraph:
Original: כּתף

Transliteration: kâthêph

Phonetic: kaw-thafe'

BDB Definition:

  1. shoulder, shoulder-blade, side, slope
    1. shoulder, shoulder-blade (of man)
    2. shoulder, shoulder-pieces (of animals)
    3. side, slope (of mountain)
    4. supports (of laver)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to clothe

TWOT entry: 1059

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
